gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade Gradle wrapper distribution URL from version 7.1 to 8.11.1 to support Java 21 compilation and execution.
gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties.why_exists: Gradle 7.1 does not support Java 21 as a target or runtime; the build will fail to compile or run on JDK 21 without upgrading the wrapper.

gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Add network timeout configuration to the Gradle wrapper properties.
Enable distribution URL validation in the Gradle wrapper properties.

gradlew.bat.general_idea: Update the Gradle wrapper batch script to the latest version provided by the Gradle Wrapper tool.
Add default JVM memory options to the Gradle wrapper script.
Modernize error handling and output redirection in the Gradle wrapper script.
gradlew.bat.before:
if "%ERRORLEVEL%" == "0" goto init

echo.
echo ERROR: JAVA_HOME is not set and no 'java' command could be found in your PATH.
echo.
echo Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the
echo location of your Java installation.
gradlew.bat.after:
if %ERRORLEVEL% equ 0 goto execute

echo. 1>&2
echo ERROR: JAVA_HOME is not set and no 'java' command could be found in your PATH. 1>&2
echo. 1>&2
echo Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the 1>&2
echo location of your Java installation. 1>&2

gradlew.bat.general_idea: Simplify argument passing in the Gradle wrapper script by removing legacy Windows 9x support.
gradlew.bat.before:
-:init
-@rem Get command-line arguments, handling Windows variants
-
-if not "%OS%" == "Windows_NT" goto win9xME_args
-
-:win9xME_args
-@rem Slurp the command line arguments.
-set CMD_LINE_ARGS=
-set _SKIP=2
-
-:win9xME_args_slurp
-if "x%~1" == "x" goto execute
-
-set CMD_LINE_ARGS=%*
-
 :execute

gradlew.bat.general_idea: Update the Gradle execution command to use %* for arguments instead of the manually constructed CMD_LINE_ARGS variable.
Refactor exit code handling in the Gradle wrapper script to correctly propagate non-zero exit codes.
gradlew.bat.before:
if "%ERRORLEVEL%"=="0" goto mainEnd

:fail
rem Set variable GRADLE_EXIT_CONSOLE if you need the _script_ return code instead of
rem the _cmd.exe /c_ return code!
if  not "" == "%GRADLE_EXIT_CONSOLE%" exit 1
exit /b 1
gradlew.bat.after:
if %ERRORLEVEL% equ 0 goto mainEnd

:fail
rem Set variable GRADLE_EXIT_CONSOLE if you need the _script_ return code instead of
rem the _cmd.exe /c_ return code!
set EXIT_CODE=%ERRORLEVEL%
if %EXIT_CODE% equ 0 set EXIT_CODE=1
if not ""=="%GRADLE_EXIT_CONSOLE%" exit %EXIT_CODE%
exit /b %EXIT_CODE%

gradlew.general_idea: Replace the legacy Gradle wrapper shell script with the modern POSIX-compliant version generated by newer Gradle distributions.
gradlew.after:
#!/bin/sh

#
# Copyright © 2015-2021 the original authors.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
#
##############################################################################
#
#   Gradle start up script for POSIX generated by Gradle.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java source and target version from 11 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated to 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 3.4.0 parent POM to manage dependency versions and build configuration for the new framework version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and has different dependency management; using the old manual dependency management or old parent will cause version conflicts or missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit dependency management block in favor of Spring Boot BOM managed by the parent POM.
pom.xml.why_exists: Redundant dependency management conflicts with the parent POM's managed versions in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.before:
<dependencyManagement>
        <dependencies>
            <dependency>
                <!-- Import dependency management from Spring Boot -->
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-dependencies</artifactId>
                <version>${spring.boot.version}</version>
                <type>pom</type>
                <scope>import</scope>
            </dependency>
...

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove unused frontend dependencies (Thymeleaf, Bootstrap) that are no longer part of the project scope.
Remove Selenium dependency as browser-based testing is being removed or replaced.
Remove explicit JUnit 4 and Hamcrest dependencies in favor of JUnit 5 provided by Spring Boot Starter Test.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 is deprecated/removed in modern Spring Boot test starters; explicit inclusion causes conflicts or unused code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit Mockito and Spring Test dependencies as they are now managed by spring-boot-starter-test.
Remove explicit AssertJ and Rest Assured version properties and dependencies, relying on Spring Boot BOM.
Update Maven Surefire and Failsafe plugins to version 3.5.2 to support Java 21 and modern test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Surefire/Failsafe (2.22.2) may not fully support Java 21 module system or test discovery.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Surefire to exclude integration tests and Failsafe to include them, separating unit and integration test execution.
Replace Spring Boot Maven Plugin repackage goal with Exec Maven Plugin to run the application with specific profiles for local testing.
Remove explicit compiler plugin configuration as it is now handled by the Spring Boot parent POM.
Remove JAR plugin configuration as it is no longer needed for the project structure.

src/main/java/com/harishkannarao/demo/fe.general_idea: Refactor the conditional property annotation to use the explicit 'name' attribute instead of 'prefix' and 'value' for clarity.
Replace custom domain object with a standard List of Strings for the API response payload.
src/main/java/com/harishkannarao/demo/fe.before:
public ResponseEntity<ConditionalMessage> getMessages() {
        ConditionalMessage conditionalMessage = new ConditionalMessage("I am available!!!");
src/main/java/com/harishkannarao/demo/fe.after:
public ResponseEntity<List<String>> getMessages() {
        List<String> conditionalMessage = List.of("I am available!!!");

src/main/java/com/harishkannarao/demo/fe.general_idea: Remove unused import for the custom domain class that was replaced by List<String>.
Add import for java.util.List to support the new return type.
Replace custom domain object with standard Java List to simplify data structure.
Update configuration property key to align with new feature flag naming convention.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot application name configuration.
Refactor custom config prefix to standard feature-flags and add environment variable support.
Add new feature flag for conditional API.
